servinfo.title: Steering Gear Case Assembly Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Be sure to set front wheels (tires) in straight-ahead direction and lock steering wheel before performing the following steps; otherwise, contact coil of air bag system may get damaged.
Steering gear case bolts are pre-coated with friction stabilizer. Do not reuse steering gear box bolts, otherwise bolts may loosen.

s1.ptxt: Remove front suspension frame with steering gear case assembly.
Remove steering gear case cover (1) after detaching its claws (3) from gear case.
Remove steering gear case bolts (4), then remove steering gear case assembly (2) from front suspension frame.
Mount steering gear case assembly (1) to front suspension frame.
Tighten new steering gear case bolts (2) to specified torque.
Align grooves (4) in steering gear case (1) and steering gear cover (3) with each other.
Install steering gear cover (3) to steering gear case (1).
Install front suspension frame with steering gear case assembly.
